title: trifolium longipes subsp. caurinum
intro: Trifolium longipes subsp. caurinum, also known as the long-stemmed clover, is a subspecies of perennial legume in the family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Trifolium longipes subsp. caurinum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
